root_text.an6.39:1.3: Lobho nidānaṁ kammānaṁ samudayāya, doso nidānaṁ kammānaṁ samudayāya, moho nidānaṁ kammānaṁ samudayāya.
root_text.an6.39:1.5: atha kho, bhikkhave, lobhā lobhova samudeti.
root_text.an6.39:1.7: atha kho, bhikkhave, dosā dosova samudeti.
root_text.an6.39:1.9: atha kho, bhikkhave, mohā mohova samudeti.
root_text.an6.39:1.10: Na, bhikkhave, lobhajena kammena dosajena kammena mohajena kammena devā paññāyanti, manussā paññāyanti, yā vā panaññāpi kāci sugatiyo.
root_text.an6.39:1.11: Atha kho, bhikkhave, lobhajena kammena dosajena kammena mohajena kammena nirayo paññāyati tiracchānayoni paññāyati pettivisayo paññāyati, yā vā panaññāpi kāci duggatiyo.
root_text.an6.39:1.12: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi nidānāni kammānaṁ samudayāya.
root_text.an6.39:2.3: Alobho nidānaṁ kammānaṁ samudayāya, adoso nidānaṁ kammānaṁ samudayāya, amoho nidānaṁ kammānaṁ samudayāya.
root_text.an6.39:2.5: atha kho, bhikkhave, alobhā alobhova samudeti.
root_text.an6.39:2.7: atha kho, bhikkhave, adosā adosova samudeti.
root_text.an6.39:2.9: atha kho, bhikkhave, amohā amohova samudeti.
root_text.an6.39:2.10: Na, bhikkhave, alobhajena kammena adosajena kammena amohajena kammena nirayo paññāyati tiracchānayoni paññāyati pettivisayo paññāyati, yā vā panaññāpi kāci duggatiyo.
root_text.an6.39:2.11: Atha kho, bhikkhave, alobhajena kammena adosajena kammena amohajena kammena devā paññāyanti, manussā paññāyanti, yā vā panaññāpi kāci sugatiyo.
root_text.an6.39:2.12: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi nidānāni kammānaṁ samudayāyā”ti.

translation_text.an6.39:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these three sources that give rise to deeds.
translation_text.an6.39:1.3: Greed, hate, and delusion are sources that give rise to deeds.
translation_text.an6.39:1.4: Greed doesn’t give rise to contentment.
translation_text.an6.39:1.5: Rather, greed just gives rise to greed.
translation_text.an6.39:1.6: Hate doesn’t give rise to love.
translation_text.an6.39:1.7: Rather, hate just gives rise to hate.
translation_text.an6.39:1.8: Delusion doesn’t give rise to understanding.
translation_text.an6.39:1.9: Rather, delusion just gives rise to delusion.
translation_text.an6.39:1.10: It’s not because of deeds born of greed, hate, and delusion that gods, humans, or those in any other good places are found.
translation_text.an6.39:1.11: Rather, it’s because of deeds born of greed, hate, and delusion that hell, the animal realm, the ghost realm, or any other bad places are found.
translation_text.an6.39:1.12: These are three sources that give rise to deeds.
translation_text.an6.39:2.1: Mendicants, there are these three sources that give rise to deeds.
translation_text.an6.39:2.3: Contentment, love, and understanding are sources that give rise to deeds.
translation_text.an6.39:2.4: Contentment doesn’t give rise to greed.
translation_text.an6.39:2.5: Rather, contentment just gives rise to contentment.
translation_text.an6.39:2.6: Love doesn’t give rise to hate.
translation_text.an6.39:2.7: Rather, love just gives rise to love.
translation_text.an6.39:2.8: Understanding doesn’t give rise to delusion.
translation_text.an6.39:2.9: Rather, understanding just gives rise to understanding.
translation_text.an6.39:2.10: It’s not because of deeds born of contentment, love, and understanding that hell, the animal realm, the ghost realm, or any other bad places are found.
translation_text.an6.39:2.11: Rather, it’s because of deeds born of contentment, love, and understanding that gods, humans, or those in any other good places are found.
translation_text.an6.39:2.12: These are three sources that give rise to deeds.”

reference_text.an6.39:1.1: csp1ed16.298, csp2ed16.298, ms16A6_258, msdiv39, pts-vp-pli3.339, vri38.54
